---
title: '2014/02/16 Journal Sun'
date: '2014-02-17T13:22:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '694278740610858287'
blogger_filename: '/2014/02/20140216-journal-sun.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<br />
<h4>
VOD:</h4>
<blockquote class="tr_bq">
<br />
<a href="https://www.bible.com/users/darrellwolfe/reading-plans/28-joseph-prince?day=96&amp;user_id=darrellwolfe&amp;version=1" target="_blank">Day 96</a>Point To Jesus, Your Qualification<br />
1 Corinthians 1:30<br />
30But of Him you are in Christ Jesus, who became for us wisdom from God —and righteousness and sanctification and redemption —<br />
When the devil accuses us of having done wrong and tells us that we don’t deserve God’s blessings, what should we do? Well, the Lord showed me one day what we are to do. We are to point everything back to Jesus, who qualifies us for all of God’s blessings.</blockquote>
<br />
<h4>
Thankful:</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Feeling:</h4>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
What's Up?</h4>
Interrupted. Never got back to this.
